target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Structural framing remains largely intact; however, 75-100% of visible facade and roof elements are missing, exposing internal voids and skeletal remains consistent with complete collapse of non-load-bearing elements.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% loss of facade and roof elements, exposing internal voids. The overall scene depicts the ruins of a multi-story brick structure with extensive structural collapse and vegetation growth through openings. The likely functional impact is complete loss of all building functions due to total destruction.
